content.full_text:
RAVI MEHTA
CHAIRMAN

FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION

February 14, 1997

Steve Baker
Aaron Read & Associates
Eleventh & L Building
1127 - 11th Street, Suite 350
Sacramento, California 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. G-97-077

Dear Mr. Baker:

This letter is a response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹ Since you are asking a question that is purely hypothetical we are declining to issue assistance at this time. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D). Copy enclosed.) If you have a question regarding the present version of the Act please feel free to submit another request for advice.

If you have any questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Steven G. Churchwell
General Counsel

[illegible]

By: Marte Castaños
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

SGC:MC:ak

¹ Government Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109 - 18995, of the California Code of Regulations.

428 J STREET, SUITE 800, SACRAMENTO, CALIFORNIA 95814 (916) 322-5660

sections.question_synthetic: The requester asked a hypothetical question regarding the Political Reform Act, but the specific details of the question are not included in this declination letter.

The substantive legal question is not disclosed. The letter cites Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D) as the basis for declining to provide advice.
